reasoning: The application is an educational LMS with AI coaching that requires a friendly, approachable, and engaging environment. A soft pastel color palette reduces cognitive overload and anxiety, while neo-brutalist solid black borders and shadows provide clear structure, focus, and a modern 'fun' vibe that suits adaptive learning, avatar interactions, and dashboards without feeling overly corporate or clinical.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers must have internal padding. Use asymmetrical grids for dashboards where possible to create visual interest.

cards.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-xl shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] transition-transform duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)]

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B6B] text-white border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold shadow-[3px_3px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] hover:bg-[#ff5252] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#FF6B6B]/30
buttons.secondary: bg-[#4ECDC4] text-[#121212] border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold shadow-[3px_3px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] hover:bg-[#45b8b0] hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all
buttons.outline: bg-white text-[#121212] border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold shadow-[3px_3px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 font-medium focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#FF6B6B] shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)]

chat_interface.container: border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-2xl bg-white shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-[70vh]
chat_interface.user_bubble: bg-[#E8F5E9] border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-none p-4 max-w-[80%] self-end shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)]
chat_interface.ai_bubble: bg-[#F4F0FF] border-2 border-[#121212] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-none p-4 max-w-[80%] self-start shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)]
chat_interface.input_area: border-t-2 border-[#121212] bg-[#FAFAFA] p-4 flex gap-3

avatar_picker.item_active: border-4 border-[#FF6B6B] bg-[#FFF9C4] rounded-xl p-4 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] transform -translate-y-1 cursor-pointer
avatar_picker.item_inactive: border-2 border-[#121212] bg-white rounded-xl p-4 shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(18,18,18,1)] hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5

navbar.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b-2 border-[#121212] px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center

hero_background.description: Student learning online with laptop, to be used in login/marketing page.

avatar_friendly.description: Friendly Mentor Avatar (Red and white robot with headphones)

avatar_motivational.description: Motivational Coach Avatar (Pink and blue abstract vibrant shape)

dashboard_empty_state.description: Minimalistic 3D pastel shapes for empty state illustrations.

motion.hover: Spring-based hover effects on buttons and cards (use framer-motion or simple CSS transform/translate).
motion.page_transition: Fade in and slight slide up (y: 20 -> 0).

accessibility.contrast: Black (#121212) text on pastel backgrounds provides excellent contrast (WCAG AAA).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements MUST have a thick focus ring (e.g., focus:ring-4 focus:ring-brand focus:outline-none).
accessibility.test_ids: Include data-testid kebab-case attributes on all inputs, buttons, and actionable items.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `@fontsource/outfit` and `@fontsource/dm-sans` to inject the typography.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind over generic Shadcn components when building the Neo-Brutalist cards to ensure border and shadow styling matches the guidelines perfectly.
For complex interactions (dropdowns, dialogs, tabs), use Shadcn UI but heavily customize the classes to add border-2 border-black and hard shadows.
Implement the 'Language Switcher' cleanly in the navbar.
The Student Dashboard must feature the Avatar Picker prominently before starting a lesson.
Do NOT use pure border-radius on everything, use rounded-xl/2xl paired with hard shadows to emphasize the playful Neo-Brutalist look.
